'''darasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swallowwort|swallowwort]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swallowwort|swallowwort]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| darasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæræsæth|dæræsæth]] || [[word:dæræsæj|dæræsæj]] || [[word:dæræsæsh|dæræsæsh]] || [[word:dæræsæ|dæræsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dararasath|dararasath]] || [[word:dararasaj|dararasaj]] || [[word:dararasash|dararasash]] || [[word:dararasa|dararasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:darasath|darasath]] || [[word:darasaj|darasaj]] || [[word:darasash|darasash]] || [[word:darasa|darasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:darafsath|darafsath]] || [[word:darafsaj|darafsaj]] || [[word:darafsash|darafsash]] || [[word:darafsaf|darafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:darasatha|darasatha]] || [[word:darasaja|darasaja]] || [[word:darasasha|darasasha]] || [[word:darasaka|darasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:darasath|darasath]] || [[word:darasaj|darasaj]] || [[word:darasash|darasash]] || [[word:darasa|darasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:darasathal|darasathal]] || [[word:darasajal|darasajal]] || [[word:darasashal|darasashal]] || [[word:darasakal|darasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:darasathatha|darasathatha]] || [[word:darasajaja|darasajaja]] || [[word:darasashasha|darasashasha]] || [[word:darasaka|darasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:darasathan|darasathan]] || [[word:darasajan|darasajan]] || [[word:darasashan|darasashan]] || [[word:darasakan|darasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:darasathaoro|darasathaoro]] || [[word:darasajaoro|darasajaoro]] || [[word:darasashaoro|darasashaoro]] || [[word:darasakaoro|darasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
